data.text/markdown:
graph of the mean number of lr pairs in each category, auto auto, autocrine (including auto_auto), and parancrine. nomelization
  • auto auto = counts / (num(cell type) - 1)
  • autocrine = counts / ((num(cell type) - 1) ** 2)
  • paracrine = counts / (num(other cell types) * num(cell type))
as expected the highest value in each cell type is the auto-autocrine, with differant ratios for each cell type, endothelial has the largest ratio while the others have a much smaller ratio. the ratio of autocrine and paracrine is varsly differant in the differant cell types, while endothelial and fibroblast have a lower autocrine level macropheges have a much higher autocrine level
